description: Send an internal system message to Nurse Sarah Mitchell (smitchell) regarding patient Maria Santos's lab results using the FreeMED system (username 'admin', password 'admin'). The message must have the subject 'Lab Results - Maria Santos' and the body: 'Maria's lipid panel is back. Cholesterol is slightly elevated at 210. Please call her to discuss diet modifications.' Ensure the communication is sent via the intra-messaging system and not recorded as a clinical progress note.
